description: As an ICT sustainability consultant, you need to extend OpenLCA's ontology to model cloud storage services. Model a data service by creating a Unit Group named 'Digital Units' containing the units 'Terabyte' (symbol: TB) and 'Gigabyte' (symbol: GB) where 1 TB equals 1000 GB. Establish a Flow Property named 'Data Amount' linked to the 'Digital Units' group. Define a Product Flow named 'Cloud Data Service' that utilizes the 'Data Amount' property with 'Terabyte' as its reference unit. Finally, configure a Process named 'Data Center Operation' that outputs 1.0 TB of the 'Cloud Data Service' as its quantitative reference. All names must be exact to pass verification.
